goDecision: NO-GO for full multi-tenant enterprise SaaS production launch. GO for a single-operator / small-team desktop deployment with the credential-provisioning items below completed.

blockers.title: No database-enforced tenant isolation
blockers.detail: All state (organizations, workspaces, missions, billing) lives in flat data/*.json files read/written by application code. No row-level or schema-level isolation boundary exists. This is an architectural gap; not fixable within a no-new-architecture mission.
blockers.blocksWhat: Multi-tenant SaaS at scale with untrusted tenants sharing infrastructure.

blockers.title: Rate limiting covers only 7 of 126 route files
blockers.detail: Login/register and a handful of high-cost surfaces (jarvis, browser, odi, runtime, whatsapp) are throttled. Every org-ladder, POST-Omega domain, coding-assistant, and production-tooling route is unthrottled. Auth-gated (not an anonymous open door), but a single compromised or malicious operator token can hammer expensive AI-backed endpoints without limit.
blockers.blocksWhat: Public multi-tenant exposure without a WAF/API-gateway-level rate limit in front of it.

blockers.title: No true self-correction in the autonomous runtime
blockers.detail: The system retries failures (Recovery, real) and escalates strategy by attempt count (real), but never revises a prior autonomous decision because it recognizes the decision's judgment was wrong. Confidence scores are computed, logged, and behaviorally ignored.
blockers.blocksWhat: Marketing or sales claims of 'self-correcting AI' or 'learns from its mistakes' at the decision level — this is not demonstrated and should not be represented as implemented.

blockers.title: 14 duplicate *Org engines are architecturally repetitive scaffolding
blockers.detail: businessOrg/autonomousOrg/civilizationOrg/ecosystemOrg/enterpriseOrg/executiveOrg/autonomousEvolutionOrg/autonomousKnowledgeOrg/platformOrg (+ *State/*Workflow siblings) have zero self-trigger and, when manually ticked, only ever mutate their own JSON — no real external connector call or real infra modification. Not merged (would be architecture redesign) or removed (real mounted routes with real, if self-referential, data behind them).
blockers.blocksWhat: Selling these subsystems as live autonomous business/civilization operations would be a factual misrepresentation to an enterprise buyer.

envVars: WA_PHONE_ID (currently set to a WABA id, not a phone-number-id)
credentialsNeeded.status: BROKEN — credential VALUE is wrong type, not missing. Correct value must be fetched from {WABA_ID}/phone_numbers on Meta's Graph API.

brokenFeatures.detail: WA_PHONE_ID in .env holds a WhatsApp Business Account ID, not a phone-number-id, causing a 400 on the display_phone_number field probe. Connector code is correct; the fix is an operator credential correction.

backend/routes/tasks.js requires agents/metrics/metricsCollector.cjs, which exists only under _archive/, not the live agents/ tree. Degrades to 503 rather than crashing. /scheduler/status is unaffected (different code path).
brokenFeatures.fixNotApplied: Resurrecting archived code without knowing why it was archived was judged out of scope for this pass.

disabledFeatures.detail: See docs/current/v1-feature-matrix.json frontendPages.disabledList for the full list with reasons. All were fake-data or backend-missing pages, removed from nav/search/command-palette (unreachable) with component files retained on disk.

removedFeatures.reason: Complete, working, but entirely unused duplicate of the real auth mechanism (backend/middleware/authMiddleware.js). Zero callers confirmed across the full repo.

verifiedFeatures.authentication: REAL — HS256 JWT, constant-time comparison, expiry enforced, fail-closed dev bypass. Live: no cookie -> 401, bad token -> 401, valid token -> 200.
verifiedFeatures.authorization: REAL — org RBAC and workspace membership return 403 to a second 'attacker' identity on both read and privileged operations.
verifiedFeatures.workspaceIsolation: REAL — GET /workspace/:id/members now enforces membership (fixed this session; previously leaked any workspace's member list to any authenticated user).
verifiedFeatures.aiRouter: REAL — 12-provider router, real HTTP, live-CONNECTED with OpenAI this session.
verifiedFeatures.missionEngine: REAL — real fs persistence, 228+ real missions observed live.
verifiedFeatures.memorySystem: REAL — remember()/recall() with genuine persistence and similarity search, live-verified.
verifiedFeatures.vault: REAL — AES-256-GCM, wired to real callers, live dashboard/health endpoints return real data.
verifiedFeatures.oauthLayer: REAL — authorization-code exchange/refresh/revoke implemented for 6 providers.
verifiedFeatures.autonomousCore: REAL — Observe/Execute/Recover/Loop genuinely fire with zero human trigger and produce real external side effects (1585 real AI provider HTTP calls in one idle window).
verifiedFeatures.electronBackendSpawn: REAL — live-verified the exact spawn mechanism main.cjs uses reaches a real /health 200.
verifiedFeatures.electronAutoUpdaterFeed: REAL — live HTTP confirms the GitHub release feed is reachable.
verifiedFeatures.ci: REAL — regression suite, frontend build, and deploy-script syntax all pass; real remote CI (rc6) confirmed running via gh CLI, no recent failures.
verifiedFeatures.backups: REAL — safe-backup.cjs creates real tar.gz snapshots; test-restore.cjs disaster-recovery validator passes end to end.
verifiedFeatures.pm2: REAL — both apps reach online with no crash-loop observed.

regressionStatus.confirmedRuns: Multiple times across this session, most recently after all fixes were applied.

estimatedEffortRemaining.note: Stated as concrete units of work per mission rules — no percentages, no time estimates.
items: Real database-backed tenant isolation for organizations/workspaces/billing (the largest single item; explicitly new architecture, outside this mission's scope even to size).
3 new backend route namespaces (/dev/*, /personal/*, /enterprise/*) plus real service logic, to make the disabled DeveloperOS/PersonalOS/EnterpriseOS tabs real rather than removed.
Real Gmail/Calendar/Drive API calls (currently zero exist) to make those connectors real rather than scope-only.
A real PayPal connector built from scratch (currently zero code).
A decision on the *Org engine family: wire real autonomous triggers and real external actions, or stop describing it as autonomous business operation in customer-facing material.
Rate-limiter coverage extended across the ~119 currently-unthrottled route files, or an API-gateway-level rate limit in front of the whole app.
Credential provisioning (not code) for GitHub/Google/Slack/Discord/Stripe/Notion/Anthropic/Gemini/Cloudflare/AWS/Supabase to move them from WAITING FOR CREDS to live-verified CONNECTED.
A correct WA_PHONE_ID value (operator action, not code) to move WhatsApp from BROKEN to CONNECTED.
A decision on whether to resurrect agents/metrics/metricsCollector.cjs from _archive/ (unknown why it was archived) to fix /queue/status.
